name: Probabilistic Prompt Authority Drift
failure_mode: The system still runs, but authority weighting drifts so stale or lower-priority evidence quietly outranks approved bank-change records on risky invoice slices.
detection: Day 7 eval thresholds fail even though the app remains online. The prompt drift report shows authority-policy regressions on the probabilistic drift slice.
remediation: 1. Inspect build/day7/synthetic_cases_drift.jsonl. 2. Patch the durable authority policy in src/aegisap/day3/. 3. Re-run the enforced eval suite until build/day7/prompt_drift_report.json passes thresholds.
